product.description: PowerUp Money is India's trusted Mutual Fund Advisory App. It empowers users to select, review, and rebalance their mutual funds with expert advice and 20 years of data, helping them maintain an optimal portfolio.

features.name: Mutual Fund Selection
features.description: Allows users to select mutual funds.

features.name: Mutual Fund Review
features.description: Enables users to review their mutual funds.

features.name: Mutual Fund Rebalancing
features.description: Facilitates rebalancing of mutual fund portfolios.

features.name: Expert Advice
features.description: Provides expert guidance for mutual fund management.

features.name: Data Integration
features.description: Utilizes 20 years of data for insights and recommendations.

features.name: Portfolio Management
features.description: Helps users keep their portfolio in top form.

product.targeted_market: Individuals in India who are looking for expert guidance and data-driven insights to manage their mutual fund investments effectively. This includes both novice investors and those with existing portfolios seeking to optimize their performance.
product.problem_product_is_solving: The app addresses the complexity and uncertainty associated with selecting, reviewing, and rebalancing mutual funds. It aims to solve the problem of investors lacking the necessary expertise, time, or data to make informed decisions, thereby helping them achieve and maintain an optimal investment portfolio.
product.formulation_attribution: The product is described as 'India's trusted Mutual Fund Advisory App', implying it is developed and operated within India and trusted by its users. No specific manufacturer or formulation details are provided.
